User.title: User
User.description: Represents a customer account in the JamaStore application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for account creation and notifications.

telegramUsername.description: The user's Telegram username, linked for receiving automated order status notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's purchase order, with status management and notification capabilities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed the order.

customerName.description: Name of the customer for quick access.

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'New', 'Confirmed', 'Shipped', 'Delivered').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was last updated.

definition.description: Presence of a UID here grants Admin privileges.
Customer orders visible to owners and admins.
